Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.StringValue

Packages that use StringValue
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.commons.utils
General purpose utility classes for common operations.

  • Uses of StringValue in com.nib.commons.storage

    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage that return StringValue
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    StringValue
    AbstractNNumeric.getDateOfInteger()
    Gets the date representation of the integer value of the numeric field.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.getString()
    Retrieves a string value by extracting a segment from the underlying storage and creating a new StringValue object with it.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.getString(int offset, int length)
    Retrieves a StringValue from the storage based on the specified offset and length.
    StringValue
    NZoned.getString()
     
    StringValue
    StringValue.getString()
    Retrieves the current StringValue instance.
    StringValue
    StringValue.getString(int offset, int length)
    Extracts a substring from the current StringValue instance starting at a specified offset and spanning the specified length, then returns it as a new StringValue.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.reverse()
    Reverses the current value of the field instance of the current StringValue instance.
    StringValue
    StringValue.substring(int startIndex, int endIndex)
    Extracts a substring from the current StringValue instance, starting at the specified start index (inclusive) and ending at the specified end index (exclusive).
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.substringToValue(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Extracts a substring from the current value of the field instance representation of this object up to the first occurrence of the given delimiter.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.substringToValue(String delimiter)
    Extracts a substring from the current value of the field instance up to, but not including, the first occurrence of the specified delimiter.
    StringValue
    StringValue.substringToValue(String delimiter)
    Extracts a substring from the current string value that ends at the first occurrence of the specified delimiter.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.toLowerCase()
    Converts the string value of the current value of the field instance to lowercase.
    StringValue
    StringValue.toLowerCase()
    Converts the string value stored in this StringValue instance to lowercase and returns the resulting value as a new StringValue instance.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.toUpperCase()
    Converts the string value of the current value of the field instance to uppercase.
    StringValue
    StringValue.toUpperCase()
    Converts the string value stored in this StringValue instance to uppercase and returns the resulting value as a new StringValue instance.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.trim()
    Trims leading and trailing whitespace from the string value represented by the current value of the field instance.
    StringValue
    StringValue.trim()
    Trims any leading and trailing whitespace from the string value stored in this StringValue instance and returns the resulting value as a new StringValue instance.
    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage with parameters of type StringValue
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    NChar.equals(StringValue value)
    Compares this object to the specified StringValue for equality.
    boolean
    NGroup.equals(StringValue value)
    Compares the provided StringValue with the value of the current instance to determine if they are equal.
    boolean
    StringValue.equals(StringValue value)
    Compares the specified StringValue object with the current StringValue instance for equality.
    boolean
    NChar.greaterEqualThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current object's value with the value of the provided StringValue object to determine whether it is greater than or equal to it.
    boolean
    NGroup.greaterEqualThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current object to the specified StringValue object to determine if the current object is greater than or equal to the given value.
    boolean
    NChar.greaterThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current StringValue object with the specified StringValue to determine if the current object is greater than the provided value.
    boolean
    NGroup.greaterThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current instance with the string representation of the given StringValue to determine if the current instance is greater.
    boolean
    NChar.lessEqualThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current object with a given StringValue to determine if the current object is less than or equal to the specified value.
    boolean
    NGroup.lessEqualThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current object with the specified StringValue object to determine if it is less than or equal to the provided value.
    boolean
    NChar.lessThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current StringValue with the given StringValue and determines if the current value is lexicographically less than the provided value.
    boolean
    NGroup.lessThan(StringValue value)
    Compares the current instance with the string representation of the given StringValue to determine if the current instance is less.
    boolean
    NChar.notEquals(StringValue value)
    Compares the current object with the given StringValue and determines if they are not equal.
    void
    AbstractNField.setString(int offset, int length, StringValue value)
    Sets a string value at the specified offset and length within the current field instance.
    void
    AbstractNNumeric.setValue(StringValue value)
    Sets the value of the numeric field using a StringValue.
    void
    NChar.setValue(StringValue value)
    Sets the value of this NChar instance using the specified StringValue.
    void
    NGroup.setValue(StringValue value)
    Sets the value of the current instance by converting the given StringValue to a string and delegating to the setString method.
